items.title: PostgreSQL 19 Beta 2 ships with feature set frozen: SQL/PGQ graph queries, REPACK, parallel autovacuum, JIT off by default
Oracle July 2026 CPU patches 8 MySQL vulnerabilities, 4 remotely exploitable without authentication
